description: compute_invoice: previous_balance is reset to 0 before being subtracted, so the carried balance is silently never applied (use-before-reset introduced by reordering)
_has_more: boundary changed from `end < total` to `end <= total` while extracting the helper, reporting a phantom next page when the last page exactly fills the chunk
save_pending: the try/except around store.write_all was dropped while inlining, so a down datastore now raises instead of being retried
